text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, at the gym...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: One... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Two... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Can I have a word, Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Uh, s-sure!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Your sighs keep throwing off my concentration.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry! I didn't mean to bother you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Look, just tell me what you're sighing about.
You'll feel better if you just let it out.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This first-rate Umamusume you so admire can be
a first-rate therapist too.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh, King! Well, if you insist...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Recently, I feel like my shoulders have been
getting bulkier. I don't feel like a princess at all!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Toned is one thing, but I feel like I'm completely
shredded! No prince is going to want me now!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I know you can be shy sometimes, but this really takes the carrot cake.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: People come in all shapes and sizes.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ask yourself why you're training your shoulder
muscles. Why do you want to be faster?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Because if I'm faster than everyone else, my
prince will find me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. Which is why those muscles are proof you
are close to achieving your dreams. It's absurd to
reject them.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Didn't you come to this academy because you
didn't want to be a princess that just waits around
for her prince?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: King... You're... completely right!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to lift this 150 kilogram barbell right
now! Hnnngh. HAAAH!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now, that's real spunk.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...I can't let myself fall behind either.
